scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['.next','node_modules/.cache','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Frontend cache cleaned');"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['.next','node_modules/.cache','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('Frontend build cache cleaned');"
